title: brunfelsia hydrangeiformis subsp. capitata
intro: Brunfelsia hydrangeiformis subsp. capitata, commonly known as the "Queen of the Night" flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae. This plant is native to South America and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Brunfelsia hydrangeiformis subsp. capitata include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting relaxation and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in tea form or as a tincture, and have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including anxiety and insomnia.
